task_name: Add About tab to user profile
user_story: As a visitor, I can open an About tab on a Conduit user profile page to read a short bio section.
acceptance_criteria: Profile page includes an About tab.
About tab content renders without breaking existing articles/favorites tabs.
The implementation does not require backend schema changes.
Empty or missing bio data is handled gracefully.
constraints: Do not modify .env files or lockfiles.
